A_mcp_layer_live_on_main.description: Worker is live, McpAgent layer is merged to chittyentity main, and the binding is wired in chittymcp/wrangler.jsonc. As of 2026-05-27 the 16 backlog feat/*-mcp-layer branches (PRs #271-#287) are all merged.

C_no_mcp_no_deploy.description: Worker code exists in chittyentity/workers/ but is not deployed and has no MCP layer. Needs full SOP run: implement tools, deploy, wrap in McpAgent, register, bind.

endpoint_migration.tracking: chittyentity commit d2cc353 (feat: canonicalize {name}.chitty.cc per user override)

next_actions: Run scripts/scaffold-mcp.ts against each Bucket C service to produce its McpAgent layer
For each Bucket C service: implement at least one real tool (no mocks), deploy worker (DNS + custom domain), wrap in McpAgent, register tags, bind in chittymcp/wrangler.jsonc
Refresh this triage doc after each Bucket C deploy
